headline: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: PDF Solutions, LifeStance Health, Paychex in Focus
summary: Zacks highlights PDF Solutions, LifeStance Health and Paychex among stocks and portfolios that outperformed as markets weighed softer jobs data and earnings.
